observation.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && for f in test/cases/functional-1/011_add.sysu.c test/cases/functional-3/056_short_circuit.sysu.c test/cases/functional-3/047_op_priority5.sysu.c test/cases/functional-3/049_unary_op.sysu.c test/cases/functional-3/051_logi_assign.sysu.c; do bn=$(basename $f); subdir=$(echo "$f" | cut -d/ -f3); echo "=== $bn ==="; cat "build/test/task1/$subdir/$bn/answer.txt" 2>/dev/null | head -50; done
